name: @axicharts/charts-spec
description: Layer 2 panel spec compiler and vertical templates for AxiCharts.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/cli.ts --format esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external @axicharts/charts --external @axicharts/charts-theme --external @axicharts/charts-sankey --external @axicharts/charts-geo --external @axicharts/charts-map --external @axicharts/charts-gantt --clean
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/cli.ts --format esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external @axicharts/charts --external @axicharts/charts-theme --external @axicharts/charts-sankey --external @axicharts/charts-geo --external @axicharts/charts-map --external @axicharts/charts-gantt --watch
